scripts.build: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--conditions=cloudflare pnpm --filter=@node-core/website exec opennextjs-cloudflare build --openNextConfigPath ../../platforms/cloudflare/open-next.config.ts --config ../../platforms/cloudflare/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--conditions=cloudflare pnpm --filter=@node-core/website exec opennextjs-cloudflare deploy --openNextConfigPath ../../platforms/cloudflare/open-next.config.ts --config ../../platforms/cloudflare/wrangler.jsonc
